pi_items.source: Task description narrative and verifier.py docstring.
Task description narrative and verifier.py docstring.
verifier.py sums points up to 100 across 5 criteria (25+20+20+20+15).
verifier.py explicitly checks for furniture items, new walls, new doors/windows, room definitions, and dimension annotations.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for sweet_home_3d_env certification_testing_center task. Verified that the initial environment is synthetically generated by stripping all furniture from the official Sweet Home 3D 'SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d' contemporary villa sample file to simulate an empty commercial shell. All metadata claims exactly match the task description instructions and the scoring logic in verifier.py, which evaluates the placement of minimum numbers of desks, chairs, lockers, appliances, walls, doors, rooms, and dimension lines, with a passing score of 70/100.
